weight = 10
displayTitle = "tm_filter.sys"
+++


{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# tm_filter.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

Teramind Inc. kernel-mode filter drivers (tm_filter.sys and tmfsdrv2.sys) providing kernel-level input capture including keylogging and screen capture capabilities. Both signed by DigiCert under Teramind Inc. certificate. Execution parents point to teramind_agent MSI installer. Abused by threat actors for stealth monitoring operations. tmfsdrv2.sys has 1/73 detections on VirusTotal.
- **UUID**: 651d1cdc-3e13-405f-b8b3-65cc70cef5a8
- **Created**: 2026-03-20
- **Author**: Michael Haag

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/3f9829071109fc051bd7f6b01a35ed46.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "tm_filter.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create tmfsdrv2 binPath=C:\windows\temp\tmfsdrv2.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start tmfsdrv2
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Capture user input and screen content for surveillance | kernel | Windows 10 |



### Detections

{{< column >}}

{{< details "Expand" >}}
